steps.title: Identify the core principle
steps.content: The passage states that Hua Wenyi was chosen for her "lifetime contributions to the arts," revealing that the fellowship recognizes and celebrates artistic achievement.

steps.title: Find the word that expresses recognition
steps.content:
The blank needs a word meaning to recognize and celebrate — the fellowship gives Kunqu opera singer Hua Wenyi recognition for her lifetime contributions. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — Begin: the fellowship was created to begin exceptional artists — begin means to start something; a fellowship recognizes artists, it doesn't initiate their careers. ✗
  • Choice B — Honor: the fellowship was created to honor exceptional artists — honor means to show respect and recognition, matching a fellowship that celebrates lifetime contributions. ✓
  • Choice C — Overshadow: the fellowship was created to overshadow exceptional artists — overshadow means to diminish or eclipse, the opposite of celebrating someone's achievements. ✗
  • Choice D — Distract: the fellowship was created to distract exceptional artists — distract means to divert attention away; giving someone an award is the opposite of distracting them. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
